bragi.label: Bragi
bragi.notes: Mobile inference host; vLLM at :8020, alternate at :1234.

sindri.label: Sindri
sindri.notes: Primary CUDA inference host; vLLM at :8020.

vidar.label: Vidar
vidar.notes: Apple Silicon inference host for MLX / oMLX backends; oMLX at :1235.

grendel.label: Grendel
grendel.notes: Apple Silicon RapidMLX backend at :8000 (full hardware spec TBD).
